reason: This is a standard Islamic prayer/supplication text (seeking refuge in Allah and reciting from Al-Fatiha). Contains no extremist content or ISIS-related messaging.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Prayers and Supplications
original_post: أعوذ بالله السميع العليم من الشيطان الرجيم من همزه و نفخه و نفثه (١) الْحَمْدُ للّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ (٢) الرَّحْمـنِ الرَّ٢١
